message:
perf(fusion,index): compute in_both_sources inline during RRF insertion and pre-screen WAL hashes in search

- Compute in_both_sources flag inline when lexical/semantic results are
  inserted into the RRF scratch map, eliminating the separate post-pass
- Pre-build AHashSet of WAL doc_id hashes for O(1) pre-screening in
  resolve_sorted_entries, falling back to string verification only on
  hash match — avoids O(W) linear scan per main-index winner
- Read pre-computed doc_id_hash from record table instead of recomputing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
